conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const now = new Date(); const kstHour = (now.getUTCHours() + 9) % 24; return kstHour >= 13 && kstHour < 23; })() }}

parameters.amount: ={{ (() => { const now = new Date(); const kstNow = new Date(now.getTime() + 9 * 3600 * 1000); const kstHour = kstNow.getUTCHours(); const kstMin = kstNow.getUTCMinutes(); const kstSec = kstNow.getUTCSeconds(); const minutesUntil1pm = ((13 - kstHour) * 60 - kstMin) + (kstHour >= 13 ? 24 * 60 : 0) - Math.floor(kstSec / 60); return Math.max(minutesUntil1pm, 1); })() }}
